Native32 remediation project-LICHEN-o4yi now requires provisioning and cleaning up a replacement x86 builder rather than restoring terminated i-0b9423e5181dd9066. FINAL CLEAN REVIEW TRAIL: coverage ses_093b63328ffe5lNcByADVUbUkY; evidence/provenance ses_093a02e14ffeM6RYFVZwj3dORy; AWS cleanup/remediation ses_093a02de5ffei9X0L1hHKRtq0S. All three independently returned no findings after final errata. Authorized temporary security group sg-0643ba702993e88b4 was deleted and independently verified InvalidGroup.NotFound; no m5m1/Project-tagged temporary security groups or builder ENIs remain."}
